name: Brooklyn Reentry Collective
services_summary: Case management, housing referrals, fair-chance employment, peer support. Fictional demo org.

name: The Fortune Society
services_summary: Housing (The Castle, Castle Gardens), employment, education, family services.

name: The Osborne Association
services_summary: Employment, family services, court advocacy, youth and elder reentry programs.

name: Center for Employment Opportunities
services_summary: Immediate transitional work, job coaching, and placement for people recently released.

name: The Doe Fund
services_summary: Ready, Willing & Able — paid work, housing, and training for men exiting incarceration or homelessness.

name: Legal Aid Society — Reentry Unit
services_summary: Record sealing, expungement support, civil legal aid, know-your-rights.

name: Per Scholas
services_summary: Free 12–15 week IT training programs (cybersecurity, cloud, software engineering).

name: IDNYC
services_summary: Free municipal ID card. Accepted for many city services. Helpful while waiting on state ID.

name: ACCESS HRA
services_summary: Apply for SNAP, Medicaid, and Cash Assistance online or in person.

name: NY State DMV (NYC offices)
location: NYC (Brooklyn, Manhattan, Bronx, Queens, Staten Island)
services_summary: Apply for a NY State non-driver ID with required documents.
